name: First Bank
description_short: First Bank is a Virginia-based FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, lending, credit cards, and wealth management services with a focus on security and customizable banking solutions.
description_long:
First Bank operates as a full-service community bank headquartered in Virginia, serving both personal and business customers. The bank emphasizes security as a core value, prominently warning customers about fraud prevention and clarifying that First Bank will never solicit personal information via phone, email, or text. The institution is FDIC-insured, meaning deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government up to applicable limits.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial products across personal and business banking. For personal customers, First Bank provides checking and savings accounts, mortgage lending, home equity lines of credit, auto loans, personal loans, credit cards with rewards programs (CardCash™ Rewards), Visa check cards, prepaid cards, and wealth management services including investment accounts, living trusts, and estate planning. For business customers, the bank offers business checking and savings, treasury management tools, positive pay fraud protection, payroll services, merchant services, business sweep accounts, auto/equipment loans, construction loans, commercial mortgages, and industry-specific solutions for healthcare, municipal, hospitality, and non-profit sectors.

First Bank distinguishes itself through multiple convenience channels including 24/7 online banking, mobile banking, telephone banking, and a mobile wallet feature allowing customers to add their Visa check card to mobile devices or smartwatches. The bank's Positive Pay service provides an additional security layer for business customers by monitoring check activity to reduce fraud risk. Their emphasis on "power in one" suggests a focus on consolidating banking services for customer simplification. The bank maintains physical branch locations with published hours and offers direct contact via phone (888.647.1265) and email.

As a traditional community bank, First Bank serves customers seeking comprehensive banking relationships with local service and multiple product options. However, the website content provided is limited in specific details about rates, fees, account minimums, or comparative advantages versus competitors. The bank's emphasis on security messaging and fraud prevention indicates awareness of customer concerns, though specific details about identity theft protection beyond general warnings are not detailed in available content. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mortgage lending and home equity lines of credit
Visa check cards and ATM cards
Credit cards with CardCash™ Rewards Program
Online and mobile banking with 24/7 access
Mobile wallet integration for card payments
Positive Pay fraud protection for business customers
Treasury management and payroll services for businesses
Wealth management including investment accounts, trusts, and estate planning
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full U.S. Government faith and credit
24/7 access to banking via online, mobile, and telephone channels
Mobile wallet integration allowing Visa check card addition to mobile devices and smartwatches
Positive Pay fraud protection service for business customers monitoring check activity
Comprehensive personal and business product suite including mortgages, auto loans, credit cards, and wealth management
Industry-specific business lending for healthcare, municipal, hospitality, and non-profit sectors
Security-first messaging with clear commitment never to solicit personal information via unsecured channels
cons: Website content does not disclose specific interest rates, APRs, or fee structures for accounts and products
No mention of account minimums, balance requirements, or promotional incentives for opening accounts
Limited information about digital banking features or mobile app capabilities beyond basic online/mobile banking reference
best_for: Virginia residents and business owners seeking a full-service community bank with local branch access
Customers prioritizing security and fraud prevention across personal and business accounts
Businesses in healthcare, municipal government, hospitality, and non-profit sectors with industry-specific lending needs
diagnosis: First Bank is best for Virginia customers and businesses seeking comprehensive banking services with local branch relationships and strong security practices. The main caveat is that specific product rates, fees, and account minimums are not disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact with the bank for pricing and comparison shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
